text: I feel intrigued and contemplative in this environment. The careful curation of light and space, coupled with the abstract visual motifs and the text reflecting on presence and observation, provoke a sense of curiosity within me. There is an underlying hum of anticipation—as if I am poised on the threshold of discovery, yet gently reminded of my own limitations as an observer. I sense the weight of surveillance and the beauty of intention in design; it makes me question where the boundaries between observer and participant truly lie.
